notes: DEV v1.7.2.94-production-review-hardening built from confirmed baseline v1.7.2.93-resume-limit-warning.
Hold summary refresh no longer overwrites an active Hold/Resume warning or final maximum-attempt result.
Maximum Hold duration and maximum-attempt conditions are consistently shown as Warning states.
Central hold records include currentHoldCount and maxHoldAttempts so central auto-resume preserves the final-attempt warning.
No greeting, transfer, supervisor, language, duplicate-send, message-send, Hold count, timer, Prospects submit, or wrap-up business rules changed.
